params.name: Mystic Mountain
params.description:
On Oct 19, 2008 AD, the Hubble telescope photographed this Mystic Mountain.
Hubble's Wide Field Camera 3 observed the Mystic Mountain. This craggy fantasy mountaintop enshrouded by wispy clouds looks like a bizarre landscape. The NASA/ESA Hubble Space Telescope image, which is even more dramatic than fiction, captures the chaotic activity atop a pillar of gas and dust, three light-years tall, which is being eaten away by the brilliant light from nearby bright stars. The pillar is also being a …
